description: Style Note Add a touch of sizzle to any outfit with this exotic purse from pitaraa. Choose from a variety of colours and styles for your next exciting night on the town Product Details Copper and cream coloured purse that has a press buttoned closure Two insert pockets and eight card slots on the right with an id card holder One zipped coin pocket, one insert pocket and eight card slots on the left side of the purse Zipped pocket at the back Material and CareZari outer with a leatherette inner lining Size Dimensions: 21 cm x 11 cm
